findings.title: 4 of 7 task-specified test files never created
findings.issue: Missing test files for github-metrics, queue/types, refresh-skills, dedup-skills.

findings.title: Existing test files missing increment-specific test cases
findings.issue: Missing star fetch, slug field, shard dispatch, and buildSearchEntry tests.

findings.title: Deprecated skills not removed from search index during enrichment
findings.issue: Added 'remove' shard dispatch when updates.isDeprecated && opts.searchKv.

findings.title: Search shard entry uses raw repoUrl instead of normalized
forceForks not sanitized like forceStars
findings.issue: Applied Math.max(0, Math.floor()) to forceForks. Added skillNames array validation.

findings.title: Sequential GitHub fetches in refresh-skills could timeout
findings.issue: Sequential fetches with 8s timeout each. Admin-only, mitigated by take:500 limit.

findings.title: Dedup endpoint N+1 query pattern
findings.issue: One query per group + one update per loser. Admin-only, acceptable for current scale.

findings.title: skillNames array type not validated at runtime
